tasks.label: Shared Fabric: Boot Current Workspace
args:
set -euo pipefail
GLOBAL_ROOT="${AGF_GLOBAL_ROOT:-$1}"
WORKSPACE="${workspaceFolder}"
AGENT="${input:sharedFabricAgent}"
TASK_ID="${input:sharedFabricTaskId}"
if [[ -z "$TASK_ID" ]]; then
  TASK_ID="shared-fabric-${AGENT}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
fi
python3 "$GLOBAL_ROOT/scripts/sync/preflight_check.py" \
  --global-root "$GLOBAL_ROOT" \
  --workspace "$WORKSPACE" \
  --agent "$AGENT" \
  --task-id "$TASK_ID" \
  --emit-receipt
python3 "$GLOBAL_ROOT/scripts/sync/sync_all.py" \
  --global-root "$GLOBAL_ROOT" \
  --workspace "$WORKSPACE" \
  --agent "$AGENT" \
  --task-id "$TASK_ID" \
  --skip-preflight \
  --skip-receipt

tasks.label: Shared Fabric: Sync Current Workspace
args:
set -euo pipefail
GLOBAL_ROOT="${AGF_GLOBAL_ROOT:-$1}"
WORKSPACE="${workspaceFolder}"
AGENT="${input:sharedFabricAgent}"
TASK_ID="${input:sharedFabricTaskId}"
if [[ -z "$TASK_ID" ]]; then
  TASK_ID="shared-fabric-${AGENT}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
fi
python3 "$GLOBAL_ROOT/scripts/sync/sync_all.py" \
  --global-root "$GLOBAL_ROOT" \
  --workspace "$WORKSPACE" \
  --agent "$AGENT" \
  --task-id "$TASK_ID" \
  --skip-preflight \
  --skip-receipt

tasks.label: Shared Fabric: Postflight Sync
args:
set -euo pipefail
GLOBAL_ROOT="${AGF_GLOBAL_ROOT:-$1}"
WORKSPACE="${workspaceFolder}"
AGENT="${input:sharedFabricAgent}"
TASK_ID="${input:sharedFabricTaskId}"
if [[ -z "$TASK_ID" ]]; then
  TASK_ID="shared-fabric-${AGENT}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
fi
SUMMARY="${input:sharedFabricSummary}"
DECISION="${input:sharedFabricDecision}"
OPEN_LOOP="${input:sharedFabricOpenLoop}"
HANDOFF="${input:sharedFabricHandoff}"
ARGS=(--global-root "$GLOBAL_ROOT" --workspace "$WORKSPACE" --agent "$AGENT" --task-id "$TASK_ID" --summary "$SUMMARY")
if [[ -n "$DECISION" ]]; then ARGS+=(--decision "$DECISION"); fi
if [[ -n "$OPEN_LOOP" ]]; then ARGS+=(--open-loop "$OPEN_LOOP"); fi
if [[ -n "$HANDOFF" ]]; then ARGS+=(--handoff "$HANDOFF"); fi
python3 "$GLOBAL_ROOT/scripts/sync/postflight_sync.py" "${ARGS[@]}"

inputs.description: Global Agent Fabric root. You can also set AGF_GLOBAL_ROOT in your shell.
Select the runtime identity for this shared fabric action
Optional task id override for shared fabric commands
Optional decision note for postflight sync
Optional open loop for postflight sync
Optional handoff note for postflight sync
